prs.title: Update README documentation
prs.body:
This PR updates the README documentation for the capstone project.

Changes included:
- Added project overview
- Added problem statement
- Added data processing and analysis details
- Improved documentation for better project understanding

prs.title: Add project and data documentation
prs.body:
This PR adds documentation inside the docs folder.

Changes included:
- Added capstone project documentation
- Added data documentation
- Documented project overview, problem statement, data cleaning, EDA, and analysis process
- Added raw data file details, data relationships, feature engineering, and data flow
- Added contributor notes and documentation accuracy details

prs.title: fix: allow env generic with interfaces
prs.body:
## Fixes #28617

### Problem

The `env` helper rejected interface-based environment variable types because the previous generic constraint  
`Env extends Record<string, string | undefined>` required an index signature that interfaces don’t have.  
This caused `TS2344` when following the documented example.

### Fix

The type definition of `env` was updated and a new `EnvKey` helper type was introduced to filter valid keys.  
This allows both interfaces and type aliases to work as expected without changing runtime behavior.

### Changes Made

- Updated `env` signature using a simplified generic pattern  
- Added `EnvKey` to restrict keys to `string | undefined` values  
- Added a type-level test ensuring interface + type alias compatibility  
- Kept all runtime logic untouched  

### Result

- Interface support now matches documentation  
- Type aliases continue to work  
- Compile-time validation preserved  
- Backwards-compatible with no runtime impact

prs.title: Throw error when lean() is used on updateOne()
prs.body:
<!-- Thanks for submitting a pull request! Please provide enough information so that others can review your pull request. The two fields below are mandatory.

If you're making a change to documentation, do **not** modify a `.html` file directly. Instead, find the corresponding `.pug` file or test case in the `test/docs` directory. -->

**Summary**

fixes #13392

This PR updates Query.prototype.lean to throw a clear error when used on updateOne() operations. Since updateOne() returns a write result rather than a document, applying lean() is not meaningful. The updated behavior provides a clear and consistent error message.

<!-- Explain the **motivation** for making this change. What problem does the pull request solve? -->



**Code Change**

in lib/query.js

```js
Query.prototype.lean = function(v) {
  if (this.op === 'updateOne') {
    throw new MongooseError('`lean()` is not supported on updateOne() operations');
  }
  this._mongooseOptions.lean = arguments.length ? v : true;
  return this;
};

```

In test/model.updateOne.test.js

```js
assert.equal(affected.modifiedCount, 1);
  });

  it('throws error when using lean() on updateOne() (gh-13392)', async function() {
    let err = null;
    try {
      BlogPost.updateOne({ _id: post._id }, { $set: { title: newTitle } }).lean();
    } catch (e) {
      err = e;
    }
    assert.ok(err);
    assert.equal(err.message, '`lean()` is not supported on updateOne() operations');
  });

  it('handles $push with $ positionals (gh-1057)', async function() {
    const taskSchema = new Schema({
      name: String
```

**Testing**
- All existing test cases Passed
- Added 1 new test case that verifies:
  - lean() throws an error when used with updateOne()

labels.name: permission required
labels.description: Contact trademark owner for permission to include this icon. Take no other action in the meantime.

prs.body: *Issue:* closes #13988 *Popularity metric:* https://traffic.cv/bajajauto.com *Terms of Service link:* https://www.bajajauto.com/privacy-policy ### Checklist - [x] I have reviewed the [forbidden brands](https://github.com/simple-icons/simple-icons/blob/develop/CONTRIBUTING.md#forbidden-brands) list and confirm the brand I am submitting a PR for is not one of them, nor is it a subsidiary of one of those brands - [x] I have reviewed the brand's terms of service, and am confident we can add this icon - [x] I updated the JSON data in `data/simple-icons.json` - [x] I optimized the icon with SVGO or SVGOMG - [x] The SVG `viewbox` is `0 0 24 24` ### Description This pull request adds the icon for Bajaj Auto. Uses https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/d/d0/Bajaj_auto_logo.svg for svg

issues.title: [BUG] Incorrect Hindi Translation for "Open Recent"
issues.body: Incorrect Hindi Translation for "Open Recent" ### **Describe the bug** In the Hindi version of the UI, the menu item **"Open Recent"** is not translated into Hindi. Instead of showing the Hindi equivalent, it still displays the English text “Open Recent”. ### **To Reproduce** 1. Go to the **File (फ़ाइल)** menu. 2. Switch the interface language to **Hindi**. 3. Open the File dropdown menu. 4. Observe the item **"Open Recent"** , it appears in English, not Hindi. ### **Expected behavior** The item **"Open Recent"** should be translated into Hindi (e.g., **"हाल ही वाला खोल"**). ### **Screenshots** ### **Desktop (please complete the following information):** - **OS:** macOS - **Browser:** Chrome ### **Additional context** This is a minor UI localization issue. All other menu items appear correctly translated into Hindi, except **“Open Recent”**, which remains in English.
